name: XL Cat Kids' Character Plush - Pillowfort™
description: Let your kid showcase their love for pets with the XL Cat Kids' Character Plush from Pillowfort™. This kid's plush pillow is designed in the shape of a cat, complete with eyes, whiskers, and tail detailing for a realistic appeal and a cute look. Made of faux fur, this extra-large plush pillow feels soft to cuddle as they drift off to sleep or indulge in imaginative play.
